 import { Hono } from 'hono';
+import { z } from 'zod';
 import { db } from '../db';
 import { orders, orderItems } from '../db/schema';
 import { eq } from 'drizzle-orm';
 import { stripe } from '../services/stripe';
 
+const createOrderSchema = z.object({
+  items: z.array(z.object({
+    price: z.number().positive(),
+    qty: z.number().int().positive(),
+  })).min(1),
+});
+
 export const ordersRouter = new Hono();
 
 ordersRouter.get('/', async (c) => {
@@ -13,8 +23,15 @@ ordersRouter.get('/', async (c) => {
 
 ordersRouter.post('/', async (c) => {
   const userId = c.get('userId');
-  const body = await c.req.json();
-  const total = body.items.reduce((sum: number, item: any) => sum + item.price * item.qty, 0);
+  const rawBody = await c.req.json();
+  const parsedBody = createOrderSchema.safeParse(rawBody);
+
+  if (!parsedBody.success) {
+    return c.json({ error: 'items must be a non-empty array of items with positive numeric price and qty' }, 400);
+  }
+
+  const body = parsedBody.data;
+  const total = body.items.reduce((sum: number, item: any) => sum + item.price * item.qty, 0);
   const [order] = await db.insert(orders).values({
     userId, total, status: 'pending',
   }).returning();
